title: OHO Hearing Office → State Mapping (Curated)
description: Curated lookup mapping each SSA OHO hearing office name to its physical-site state code, used to aggregate ALJ-stage dispositions to the state level. 167 offices. Reflects each office's physical site location, not the claimant's state of residence (cases are routed by region, not strict state).

columns.name: Office
columns.description: OHO hearing office name (e.g. 'AKRON OH'). Includes NHC = National Hearing Center (virtual) and SPECIAL = Special Review Cadre (virtual workgroup).

columns.name: State
columns.description: Two-letter state code of the office's physical site (NHC/SPECIAL have no geographic home).

source.publisher: 509dds-data project (curated from SSA OHO office list)
source.title: OHO hearing-office-to-state curated mapping

license: U.S. public domain (SSA office names; project-curated mapping)
notes: Computed: a project-curated crosswalk (built by scripts/build-oho-state-aggregates.js) used as the join key for state-level ALJ aggregation; not an official published SSA table. Per the source.txt: NHC = National Hearing Center (virtual, nationwide), SPECIAL = Special Review Cadre (virtual, no geographic home). Mapping is by office physical site, not claimant residence. No temporal_coverage (it is a static lookup, not a time series). Source URL is the OHO datasets root.
